prompt: Edit image 1: Apply the edge detection style from image 2 to highlight anatomical contours. Relocate the lesion from its position in image 1 to the anterior location shown in image 3, using the lesion's appearance from image 3.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Apply the edge detection style from image 2 across the entire image to accentuate anatomical contours of the brain. Subsequently, remove the existing lesion from its current position on the right side of the brain in image 1 and introduce a new lesion in the anterior-superior location, accurately replicating the appearance, including its size, shape, texture, and brightness, from the lesion depicted in image 3.
objects: Edge detection style applied across the entire image
Lesion on the right side of the brain (should not be present)
New lesion in anterior-superior location, replicating the appearance (size, shape, texture, and brightness) from image 3
